reply:
(1) This device is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003. It's used to control and protect motors in industrial settings.

(2) The most probable fault cause is water damage from the flood, which could have shorted out the control wires.

(3) The tech should start by visually inspecting the panel for any presence of water damage and checking the wiring for any 24V control circuits. If the wires are damaged, they should replace the control panel or repair the wiring as necessary.
